Yes, I will be doing a podcast with him. Dan first became famous on the internet with [his excellent Christmas letters](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=1a74760e2df59f998ee34c96532c281ee1de8411be62ded20cf72759dba8fcb9&blog_id=42693868&post_id=91738&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=4a30cc9f5148f64e2a1a0d752c6d81e3&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=d1706d0efad90f90c5b5c0777bdee70f). More recently, Dan is the author of the NYT bestselling book [Breakneck: China's Quest to Engineer the Future](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=e0508c14e8df1c783b75c155434cb34149d3760fc6cad15c6f8974f65241c995&blog_id=42693868&post_id=91738&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=267b02a111aa939d43ca7935d16ba5a4&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYW1hem9uLmNvbS9CcmVha25lY2stQ2hpbmFzLVF1ZXN0LUVuZ2luZWVyLUZ1dHVyZS9kcC8xMzI0MTA2MDM0&email_id=d1706d0efad90f90c5b5c0777bdee70f).
Here is [Dan Wang on Wikipedia](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=f5a2ccabe59fb32b33d9d43bcbdb0260a0263f708251314e2724e131172ccc63&blog_id=42693868&post_id=91738&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=9348a7a760e2e10fdb86dc677e058900&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly9lbi53aWtpcGVkaWEub3JnL3dpa2kvRGFuX1dhbmc&email_id=d1706d0efad90f90c5b5c0777bdee70f), here is [Dan on Twitter](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=93c733ad032cd6ab51166b6b24c107cfde0f50f58b561e1346b721dbbb0f2593&blog_id=42693868&post_id=91738&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=a4a6afc760e152cd9199221536e58b34&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly94LmNvbS9kYW53d2FuZz9yZWZfc3JjPXR3c3JjJTVFZ29vZ2xlJTdDdHdjYW1wJTVFc2VycCU3Q3R3Z3IlNUVhdXRob3I&email_id=d1706d0efad90f90c5b5c0777bdee70f). I have known him for some while. So what should I ask him?
